items.definition_en: Beef is the meat that comes from cows.
items.example_en: We had beef for dinner last night.

items.definition_en: Chicken is a type of meat from a bird.
items.example_en: I like to eat chicken sandwiches.

items.definition_en: Pork is the meat from pigs.
items.example_en: She cooked pork with vegetables.

items.definition_en: Lamb is the meat of a young sheep.
items.example_en: Lamb is often served with mint sauce.

items.definition_en: Turkey is a large bird used for its meat.
items.example_en: We eat turkey at Christmas.

items.definition_en: Duck is the meat from a duck bird.
items.example_en: She roasted a duck for dinner.

items.definition_en: A sausage is meat chopped and put in a skin.
items.example_en: He likes eggs and sausage for breakfast.

items.definition_en: Bacon is a thin slice of salted pork.
items.example_en: She ate bacon with her eggs.

items.definition_en: Ham is cooked meat from the back leg of a pig.
items.example_en: He made a ham sandwich for lunch.

items.definition_en: A meatball is a small ball of ground meat.
items.example_en: She made spaghetti with meatballs.

items.definition_en: A rib is a long piece of meat with a bone.
items.example_en: We grilled ribs last weekend.

items.definition_en: A steak is a thick piece of meat, usually beef.
items.example_en: He ordered a big steak at the restaurant.

items.definition_en: A roast is meat cooked in an oven.
items.example_en: We had a beef roast for Sunday lunch.

items.definition_en: A drumstick is the lower part of a bird's leg.
items.example_en: He ate a chicken drumstick at the picnic.

items.definition_en: A wing is a part of a bird that is often eaten.
items.example_en: Chicken wings are spicy and tasty.

items.definition_en: Mince is meat that has been cut into small pieces.
items.example_en: She used beef mince to make the pie.

items.definition_en: A patty is a flat, round piece of ground meat.
items.example_en: He made burgers with chicken patties.

items.definition_en: Salami is a type of dried sausage.
items.example_en: She added salami to her pizza.

items.definition_en: Veal is the meat of a young cow or calf.
items.example_en: He ordered veal at the restaurant.

items.definition_en: Goose is the meat from a large water bird.
items.example_en: They served roast goose for the holiday.
